_comment: Docs version manifest. The selector in the navbar reads this. 'Latest' is the live site at the root base; each other entry is a frozen snapshot built from that release's git tag and deployed under its own base path by .github/workflows/deploy-docs.yml. Keep only the latest ~3 minors here so the switcher stays short. When you cut a new minor: bump the latest entry's `version`, add the previous minor as a new snapshot entry (newest first, after Latest), drop the now-4th-oldest, AND keep DOC_SNAPSHOTS in deploy-docs.yml matched to the snapshot entries below.
